text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's about time for training, and I'm looking for
Grass Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear, I just can't get one in. It must be how I'm
snapping my wrist.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I'm sorry, Trainer. Is it time for our training
session?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Practicing free throws. I'll be taking part in a
basketball game with my classmates soon.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And no matter the contest, losing is not an option
for me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
So I'm sorry, but I do have five minutes until
training, correct?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's not wrong, so I wait as she spends those last
five minutes practicing furiously. By the end of
our actual training, she's completely wiped.
